name: Bug Report

# Bug Report

## Summary

Provide a short description of the issue.

Example:

> Market Health API returns HTTP 500 when refreshing market data.

---

# Severity

Select one.

- [ ] Critical (System unavailable)
- [ ] High (Major functionality affected)
- [ ] Medium (Feature partially affected)
- [ ] Low (Minor issue)

---

Does the issue affect the database?

- [ ] No

- [ ] Always

---

# Additional Context

# Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues.
- [ ] I included reproduction steps.
- [ ] I attached relevant logs.
- [ ] I removed sensitive information.
- [ ] I tested on the latest branch.
